author: doll-agent
content: Phase-1 long tail #692 delivered: frombuffer (Vec<u8> → typed Array1, count/offset support), fromiter (Python iterable, count support), fromstring (text parsing via sep), fromfile (text mode; binary mode → use frombuffer), fromfunction (per-index Python callback). Binary fromfile mode (sep='') deferred. 525/525 passing.
